IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: FUNDS ARE PROVIDED TO OFFSET COSTS ASSOCIATED WITH LOCAL, STATE, REGIONAL, AND NATIONAL 4-H PROGRAMS AND CONFERENCES TO ALLOW MORE YOUTH TO PARTICIPATE.
IRS990.MissionDesc: THE COLORADO 4-H FOUNDATION PROVIDES POSITIVE YOUTH DEVELOPMENT AND EDUCATION BY RAISING AND DISTRIBUTING FUNDS IN SUPPORT OF DIVERSE COLORADO 4-H PROGRAMS.
IRS990.Desc: THE COLORADO 4-H FOUNDATION PROVIDES POSITIVE YOUTH DEVELOPMENT AND EDUCATION BY RAISING AND DISTRIBUTING FUNDS IN SUPPORT OF DIVERSE COLORADO 4-H PROGRAMS.

Form990ScheduleAPartVIGrp.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: SCHEDULE A, PART III, LINE 12, EXPLANATION OF OTHER INCOME:
Form990ScheduleAPartVIGrp.ExplanationTxt: SUPPLY AND MISCELLANEOUS INCOME - 2013 AMOUNT: $ 198,088. 2014 AMOUNT: $ 103,220. 2015 AMOUNT: $ 16,858. 2016 AMOUNT: $ 67,683. 2017 AMOUNT: $ 237,212. SPECIAL EVENT INCOME - 2013 AMOUNT: $ 836,494. 2014 AMOUNT: $ 497,723. 2015 AMOUNT: $ 796,929. 2016 AMOUNT: $ 840,691. 2017 AMOUNT: $ 779,165.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION A, LINE 2
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THERE ARE CERTAIN MEMBERS OF THE BOARD THAT HAVE CLOSE FAMILIAL RELATIONSHIPS OR ARE MARRIED.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION A, LINE 3
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: TULA CORPORATION HAS MANAGEMENT RESPONSIBILITIES AS IT RELATES TO ACTIVITIES OF CERTAIN 4-H FOUNDATION PROGRAMS AND FUNDRAISING ACTIVITIES, INCLUDING CHECK REQUEST AUTHORIZATIONS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 11B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: 990 REVIEWED AND APPROVED BY BOARD PRIOR TO FILING.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: GOVERNING DOCUMENTS ARE MADE AVAILABLE TO THE PUBLIC UPON REQUEST.
